chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-37 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of main case 27-09-2023 Mr. Alam Sher Bozdar, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Kashif Hussain Memon, Focal Person DEO (Primary) Ghotki submits that case of the petitioner for salary has been processed and within a short while salary shall be issued to him. Learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied. Accordingly, in view of statement of Focal Person as above, this petition is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
